{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Nye grace
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] used [[Nye grace]] to land on his feet.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
